cta.subline: 100% free • No signup • Processed on your device
hero.desc: Professional PDF editing right in your browser. No downloads, no registration, no hassle.
hero.subdesc: Start editing in seconds — your files stay 100% private on your device.
section.subtitle: Everything you need to work with PDFs — organize, protect, convert, sign, analyze, and more. All in your browser, 100% private.
features.instant.title: Instant Start
features.instant.desc: No installation, no signup, no waiting. Drop your PDF and start editing immediately in your browser
features.full.title: Full-Featured Editor
features.full.desc: Edit text, add images, annotate, reorder pages, rotate, and more — all the tools you need online
features.private.title: 100% Private & Secure
features.private.desc: All processing happens on your device. No uploads, no accounts, no data collection — total privacy
limits.title: Current Limitations
limits.pages: Works best with PDFs under 50 pages
limits.forms: Complex PDFs with forms may not render perfectly
oss.title: 100% Open Source & Free Forever
oss.desc: EditoraPDF is completely open source (MIT License) and built with modern technologies like Next.js, TypeScript, React, PDF.js, and pdf-lib. View the code, contribute features, report bugs, or fork it for your own projects.

footer.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer:
footer.disclaimer.text: EditoraPDF provides online PDF editing tools for general use only. We make no guarantees regarding accuracy, completeness, or suitability for any specific purpose. Users are responsible for reviewing all documents before use. By using this website, you agree to our

All processing happens locally in your browser and your documents never leave your device.

hiw.subtitle: Edit PDF documents online in seconds. No installation, no signup, complete privacy. Everything happens right in your browser — your files never leave your device.
hiw.step1.title: Upload Your PDF
hiw.step1.desc: Click "Edit PDF" or drag and drop your PDF file directly into the editor. EditoraPDF supports files up to 25MB and processes everything locally in your browser. No uploads to servers, no waiting — instant access.
hiw.step2.title: Edit Your Document
hiw.step2.desc: Use our powerful editor to modify your PDF. Edit text, add images, annotate, reorder pages, rotate, delete, and more. All tools work instantly in your browser with real-time preview.
hiw.step3.title: Export & Download
hiw.step3.desc: Click "Export" to instantly download your finished PDF with all changes applied. Your document remains on your device the entire time.
hiw.feat.title: What Makes EditoraPDF Different
hiw.feat.subtitle: Everything you need for PDF editing in the browser, free and without compromising privacy.
hiw.feat1.title: Instant Processing
hiw.feat1.desc: No queues or waiting. Your PDF is ready to edit immediately after opening.
hiw.feat2.title: 100% Private
hiw.feat2.desc: All operations happen on your device. Files are never sent to any server.
hiw.feat3.title: No Installation
hiw.feat3.desc: Works in modern browsers without plugins or separate applications.
hiw.feat4.title: No Registration
hiw.feat4.desc: Start working immediately without accounts, emails, or passwords.
hiw.feat5.title: Offline Support
hiw.feat5.desc: After loading the page, the tool can work without internet.
hiw.feat6.title: No Watermarks
hiw.feat6.desc: Download your finished PDFs without limitations or extra markings.
hiw.cta.title: Ready to Start?
hiw.cta.desc: Start editing PDFs online right now: no registration, no installation, free and private.
hiw.cta.subline: 100% free • No registration • Processed on your device
hiw.tools.title: Editor Tools
hiw.tools.subtitle: Core features for professional PDF work in one interface.

hiw.tech.title: How It Works Technically
hiw.tech1.title: Local Processing
hiw.tech1.desc: EditoraPDF uses PDF.js and pdf-lib, which run directly in the browser. Parsing, editing and creating PDFs is performed locally.
hiw.tech2.title: Privacy by Default
hiw.tech2.desc: Since everything runs locally, no one has access to your files. We do not store or analyze PDF documents.
hiw.tech3.title: Fast & Efficient
hiw.tech3.desc: Modern frontend ensures fast loading, smooth operation and comfortable editing even on older devices.
hiw.limits.title: Current Limitations
hiw.limit2: Best for documents up to 50 pages
hiw.limit3: Complex PDFs with forms may not render perfectly
hiw.limit4: Encrypted or password-protected PDFs are not yet supported
about.subtitle: Making PDF editing simple, accessible, and completely free for everyone. We believe privacy shouldn't be a premium feature.
about.what.title: What is EditoraPDF?
about.what.p1: EditoraPDF is a completely free, open-source online PDF editor that runs entirely in your browser. Unlike traditional PDF editors that require software installation or cloud-based services that upload your files, EditoraPDF processes everything locally on your device.
about.what.p2: Built with modern web technologies, EditoraPDF provides professional-grade PDF editing capabilities — from simple text edits to complex page management — all without compromising your privacy or requiring any signup.
about.mission.title: The Main Goal
about.mission1.title: Democratize PDF Editing
about.mission1.desc: We want professional PDF tools to be accessible to everyone regardless of budget, technical level, or privacy requirements.
about.mission2.title: Privacy by Design
about.mission2.desc: The service is built so that files stay with you. No accounts, no sending documents to a server, no compromises on confidentiality.
about.mission3.title: Open Source & Free
about.mission3.desc: We believe that a quality PDF editor can be open, transparent, and free forever. Anyone can review the code or contribute to its development.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.subtitle: Principles guiding our product development.
about.val1.title: Privacy First
about.val1.desc: All processing happens on your device. We don't see, store, or transmit your documents.
about.val2.title: Instant Access
about.val2.desc: No installation, no registration, no waiting. Open the site and start working immediately.
about.val3.title: 100% Free
about.val3.desc: No hidden fees, premium tiers, or watermarks. All core features are available right away.
about.val4.title: Powerful Tools
about.val4.desc: Text editing, annotations, page management, image insertion, and other essential features in one place.
about.val5.title: Open Source
about.val5.desc: The code is available for review, forking, and contributions. We believe in transparency and community-driven development.
about.val6.title: Community-Driven
about.val6.desc: We listen to users and improve the product based on real scenarios and suggestions.
about.tech.title: Modern Tech Stack
about.tech.p1: EditoraPDF uses modern web technologies for local PDF processing directly in the browser. We rely on PDF.js for rendering and pdf-lib for editing.
about.tech.p2: The interface is built on Next.js and React to ensure fast performance on various devices without server-side file processing.
about.oss.title: 100% open source and free forever
about.oss.desc: EditoraPDF's code is open, and the service is built as a free tool for everyday PDF work. You can review the code, submit improvements, or use the project in your own tasks.
about.cta.title: Questions or feedback?
about.cta.desc: We'd love to hear your feedback, ideas, or bug reports.
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.email.title: Primary Contact Email
contact.email.desc: Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. This is our primary contact method.
contact.social.title: Connect With Us
contact.social.desc: Follow us on social media for updates, tips, and community discussions.
contact.help.title: Need more information?
contact.help.desc: Check our policies and documentation to quickly find answers to common questions.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.desc: Terms and conditions for using EditoraPDF online PDF editor.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Learn how EditoraPDF protects your privacy. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser.
privacy.priority.title: Your Privacy is Our Priority
privacy.priority.desc: EditoraPDF processes all PDFs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device and are never uploaded to our servers.
privacy.disclaimer: Important: the service is provided for general use. Please always verify documents after editing before official use or submission.

tools.info.split.description: The Split PDF tool lets you split a large file into smaller, more manageable documents. Supports custom page ranges, fixed page counts, or splitting every N pages. Useful for email attachment limits, organizing long documents, or extracting individual sections. Formatting, images, and text quality are preserved. Processing is entirely in your browser — files are not uploaded.
tools.info.delete-pages.description: Delete Pages quickly removes unwanted pages from your PDF. Select the pages, confirm, and get a new document without those pages, preserving the quality of the remaining content. All operations are local in the browser.
tools.info.extract-pages.description: Extract Pages creates a new PDF with only the selected pages. Ideal for excerpts, splitting by chapters, or quickly sharing relevant parts. Fonts, images, and formatting are preserved. Everything happens locally.
tools.info.reorder.description: Reorder Pages provides a convenient drag-and-drop interface for changing the page order in a PDF. Perfect for correcting scan errors, preparing for printing, or restructuring sections. Document quality is not affected.
tools.info.rotate.description: Rotate Pages lets you rotate individual or all pages by 90/180/270°. Very useful for scanned documents. Content is preserved without loss and processing is local.
tools.info.insert-blank.description: Insert Blank Pages adds empty pages at selected positions: at the beginning, at the end, or after a specified page. Useful for notes, separator pages, and print preparation.
tools.info.duplicate-pages.description: Duplicate Pages creates copies of selected pages within the same PDF, placing them at desired locations. Formatting and quality are preserved.
tools.info.reverse-order.description: Reverse Page Order instantly reverses the entire document sequence. Useful for correcting scan errors or specific printing scenarios.
tools.info.split-by-size.description: Split by Size automatically divides the PDF into multiple files according to a set limit (e.g., 10 MB). Ideal for email sending or services with size restrictions.
tools.info.split-by-bookmarks.descriptio: Split by Bookmarks divides the PDF according to its bookmark/chapter structure. Convenient for large manuals, technical documentation, and books.
tools.info.sign.description: Electronic Signature lets you draw, type, or upload a signature and place it on PDF pages. Processing is local, data does not leave your device.
tools.info.redact.description: Redaction permanently hides sensitive data in the PDF. Once applied, the information cannot be recovered. The process is completely local.
tools.info.remove-hidden-data.descriptio: Clean PDF removes hidden data, metadata, scripts, and embedded files for safe document sharing.
tools.info.certificate.description: Certificate Signature signs the PDF with a cryptographic X.509 signature (.pfx/.p12) to confirm authenticity and integrity.
tools.info.pdf-to-images.description: PDF → Images converts PDF pages to PNG/JPEG/WebP with quality control and page selection. Results can be downloaded individually or as an archive.
tools.info.images-to-pdf.description: Images → PDF combines PNG/JPEG/WebP into a single document with the ability to reorder. Everything happens locally.
tools.info.pdf-to-word.description: PDF → Word converts the PDF to an editable DOCX while maximally preserving text and table structure.
tools.info.pdf-to-excel.description: PDF → Excel extracts tables to XLSX while preserving data structure for further analysis.
tools.info.pdf-to-text.description: PDF → Text extracts all text to TXT while preserving reading order — useful for search and analysis.
tools.info.pdf-to-csv.description: PDF → CSV converts tabular data from PDF to CSV, ready for Excel/Sheets and BI systems.
tools.info.pdf-to-html.description: PDF → HTML creates a web version of the document while preserving the visual appearance of pages.
tools.info.pdf-to-markdown.description: PDF → Markdown extracts text and basic structure in Markdown format for documentation and blogs.

tools.splitBySize.note: The PDF will be split into multiple files, each not exceeding the selected size. Useful for email attachments or file size limits.
tools.splitByBookmarks.title: Split by Bookmark Level
tools.splitByBookmarks.noOutline: This PDF has no bookmarks or structure. Use a PDF with bookmarks or try a different tool.
tools.splitByBookmarks.summary: The PDF will be split at each bookmark of the selected level
tools.splitByBookmarks.eachCreates: Each bookmark creates a separate PDF file.
tools.pdfToImages.pagesHelp: Leave empty to convert all pages. Examples: 1-5, 1,3,5, 1-3,5,7-9
tools.pdfToWord.pagesHelp: Leave empty to convert all pages. Examples: 1-5, 1,3,5, 1-3,5,7-9
tools.sanitize.title: Clean PDF
tools.sanitize.desc: Remove all hidden data, metadata, and sensitive information from the PDF for safe sharing.
tools.sanitize.note: All hidden data will be removed. The PDF content (text, images, pages) will remain unchanged.
tools.certificate.drop: Click or drop certificate file here
tools.certificate.note: Note: A visual signature will be added to the PDF with the certificate details. Full digital signature support may require server-side processing.
tools.complete.mergeNotReady: The merged PDF is not ready yet. Try merging again.
tools.complete.splitNotReady: The split PDFs are not ready yet. Try splitting again.
tools.complete.updatedNotReady: The updated PDF is not ready yet. Please try again.
tools.complete.extractedNotReady: The extracted PDF is not ready yet. Please try again.
tools.complete.reorderedNotReady: The reordered PDF is not ready yet. Please try again.
tools.complete.rotatedNotReady: The rotated PDF is not ready yet. Please try again.
tools.sign.signaturePad.title: Create signature
tools.sign.positionSelector.title: Select signature position
tools.sign.positionSelector.subtitle: Click on the page to place the signature, or drag to move
tools.sign.positionSelector.confirmHint: Click "Confirm Position" to place the signature here
tools.sign.positionSelector.clickToPlace: Click on the page to place the signature
tools.insertBlank.afterPageHint: Blank pages will be inserted after page
tools.meta.descSuffix: Free online PDF tool — no installation, no account required. Files are processed locally in your browser. 100% private.
tools.indexMeta.title: Free Online PDF Tools — No Signup Required
tools.indexMeta.description: All free PDF tools in one place: merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, and more. No installation, no account. Files are processed locally in your browser.
faq.contactPrompt: Can't find what you're looking for?
faq.stillDesc: We're here to help! Get in touch with our team or check out our documentation.
faq.metaDesc: Find answers to common questions about EditoraPDF — a free, open-source PDF editor. Learn about features, privacy, security, and how to use our online PDF editing tool.
schema.featuresDesc: Key features of EditoraPDF PDF Editor
schema.f1Desc: Render pages with crystal clarity, zoom seamlessly, and navigate with smart thumbnails
schema.f2Desc: Reorder, rotate, delete pages. Add text, images, shapes, and highlights
schema.f3Desc: Download your edited PDF with all changes applied. No quality loss guaranteed
schema.f4Desc: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your documents never leave your device
schema.f5Desc: Enterprise-level security by design. No server uploads, no subscriptions
schema.app.desc: Edit PDF documents online instantly without installing software or creating an account. Quick, powerful PDF editing directly in your browser with complete privacy.
schema.app.browserReq: Requires a modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari). JavaScript enabled.
schema.app.releaseNotes: Free online PDF editor with instant access. No installation, no signup, no downloads required. Edit PDFs directly in your browser.
schema.app.feat1: Instant access - no installation or signup required
schema.app.feat2: Works entirely in your browser - no downloads
schema.app.feat3: Edit PDF text and content directly
schema.app.feat8: Fill forms and add text overlays
schema.app.feat9: Export and download updated PDF instantly
schema.app.feat10: 100% private - all processing on your device
